query:
SELECT id, 
       createdAt IS NOT NULL as has_created,
       acceptedAt IS NOT NULL as has_accepted,
       deliveredAt IS NOT NULL as has_delivered,
       deliveryDuration
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'delivered' AND deliveryDuration IS NULL
LIMIT 5;
